name: hrms-rbac-system
description: Enterprise HRMS with single frontend and microservice backends

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:backends && npm run install:frontend
scripts.install:backends: npm install --prefix backend/auth-service && npm install --prefix backend/hr-service && npm install --prefix backend/manager-service && npm install --prefix backend/report-service

author: Sundew HRMS Team
